# Closet Picks

> A searchable database of every pick from the Criterion Collection's Closet Picks video series, with guest quotes, timestamped source links, and connections between guests and films.

Closet Picks is built by Weston Westenborg. Criterion.com and the Criterion Collection's published videos are the primary sources. Prefer canonical entity pages when citing a guest, film, or quote.

## Browse

- [Home](https://closetpicks.westenb.org/): Database overview, statistics, search, and recent guests.
- [Guests](https://closetpicks.westenb.org/guests/): Complete guest index.
- [Films](https://closetpicks.westenb.org/films/): Complete film index.
- [Most Popular](https://closetpicks.westenb.org/most-popular/): Films ranked by number of guest picks.
- [Sitemap](https://closetpicks.westenb.org/sitemap-index.xml): Complete canonical URL inventory.
- [RSS feed](https://closetpicks.westenb.org/feed.xml): Recently aired Closet Picks episodes.

## Machine-readable exports

- [Complete Markdown](https://closetpicks.westenb.org/exports/closet-picks.md): Human- and LLM-readable database export.
- [Guests JSON](https://closetpicks.westenb.org/exports/guests.json): Guest records and source-video metadata.
- [Films JSON](https://closetpicks.westenb.org/exports/films.json): Film records, credits, genres, and identifiers.
- [Picks JSON](https://closetpicks.westenb.org/exports/picks.json): Guest-to-film picks, quotes, timestamps, and source URLs.

## Related

- [Weston Westenborg](https://westenb.org/): Builder's personal site and project notes.
- [Criterion Closet Picks source collection](https://www.criterion.com/shop/collection/702-closet-picks): Primary Criterion source.
